title: Chargeable Fees and Costs
content: 54 55 a. Fees Chargeable to Principal/Employer: 56 57 1. Manning Fees - LMAs shall charge from their principal/employer a manning fee 58 to cover services rendered in the recruitment and deployment of seafarers. 59 60 22 2. Processing Fees - All processing fees required for deployment such as Pre- 1 Employment Medical Examination (PEME), regardless of the results thereof, 2 and medical reports in the principal’s/employer’s designated clinic, DMW and 3 OWWA fees, visas, principal’s/employer’s flag State ship requirements, 4 principal’s/employer’s required trainings and other requirements. 5 6 However, in case of seafarer’s failure or unjustified refusal to join ship after all 7 processing fees have been incurred by the principal/employer, said fees shall 8 be refunded, except recruitment or placement fees, visas and other related 9 costs, by the seafarer within thirty (30) calendar days from demand. 10 11 b. Costs Chargeable to the Seafarer. Documentation costs of all statutory 12 requirements such as, but not limited to, passport, Seafarer’s Record Book (SRB), 13 Seafarer’s Identification Card (SID), training mandated by applicable Philippine 14 laws and regulations, NBI/police/barangay clearance, and birth certificate. 15 16
